creator: marcin@studio4plus.com
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> On Tue, Apr 24, 2007 at 08:14:52PM +0000, Marcin Simonides wrote:
>>> Synopsis:       PlanetMirror sites are unsuitable for automatic downloads
> 
> How about FTP URLs?

They should work (eg. bakery distfile can be downloaded from 
ftp://ftp.planetmirror.com/pub/gnome/sources/bakery/2.4/bakery-2.4.1.tar.bz2 
and satisfies checksums, though this location doesn't seem to be listed 
in MASTER_SITE_GNOME).
-- 
Marcin Simonides
